overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a sunlit medieval Mediterranean-style town square with cobblestone streets and stone architecture. The character passes through a covered stone archway into a stable courtyard, then returns to ascend a stone staircase to an upper terrace with views of a distant castle.

events.description: character turns left to circle around the fountain area
approaching the stone archway entrance at the far end of the square

agents.ego_description: walking through the town square, circling around the central fountain and observing the surroundings

woman in yellow dress walking through the square

colorful stone buildings with red tile roofs surrounding the square
wide open area with patterned cobblestone paving

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit medieval town square with a central stone fountain. Geralt walks through the cobblestone plaza, passing NPCs including a child playing near the fountain. The camera circles around the fountain area before heading toward a large stone archway entrance at the far end of the square.

events.description: entering the dark covered archway from bright sunlight
approaching the bright exit at the far end of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered stone archway passage toward the stable courtyard

entered.detail: covered tunnel with stone walls and arched ceiling
rounded stone columns supporting the tunnel roof

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed stone archway passage. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to shadow as Geralt walks through the tunnel lined with stone columns, heading toward the bright exit visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: stable courtyard with horses and hay

events.description: exiting the archway into the stable courtyard with horses
turning to explore the stable area and observe the horses

agents.ego_description: entering the stable courtyard and walking among the horses and wooden crates

white horse standing in the courtyard near hay bales

entered.detail: enclosed courtyard with cobblestone ground and high stone walls
stacked wooden barrels and crates along the left wall
piles of hay and straw for the horses
broken wooden cart with wheels leaning against the wall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark archway, the scene opens into a sheltered stable courtyard. The area contains horses, wooden barrels, and hay bales scattered on the cobblestone ground. Geralt explores the space, walking past a white horse being tended by a stablehand, with a broken wooden cart visible in the corner.

events.description: exiting the stable courtyard back into the sunlit square
beginning to ascend the wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: exiting the stable and climbing the stone stairs to the upper terrace

notable_agents.action: man sitting on the stone steps resting

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with decorative railings leading upward
weathered blue plaster wall with arched doorways

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the stable courtyard back into the bright sunlit square, passing through the stone archway. The character approaches and begins ascending a wide stone staircase on the right, passing a man sitting on the steps, with a distinctive blue building wall visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace path with market stall and castle view

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper terrace
turning slightly to approach the market stall with castle view

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace path toward the market stall with views of the distant castle

notable_agents.action: merchant standing at the market stall with red canopy

entered.detail: elevated cobblestone path with stone railings overlooking the lower town
large elaborate castle with multiple spires visible on the horizon
wooden market stall with red fabric canopy and goods displayed
decorative stone balustrade along the edge of the terrace

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens onto an upper terrace path with views of a magnificent distant castle. Geralt walks along the elevated cobblestone path, passing a market stall with a red canopy where a merchant stands. The terrace features stone railings and offers panoramic views of the castle spires and the ocean beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval town square that transitions through a shadowed passage into a stable courtyard before ascending to an elevated terrace. It begins in a bright cobblestone plaza, circling a central stone fountain and passing NPCs before heading toward a large stone archway. As the character enters the archway, the lighting shifts dramatically from brilliant sunlight to deep shadow within a columned tunnel, which then opens back into the light of a sheltered stable courtyard filled with horses, hay bales, and wooden barrels. The camera then follows the character back through the archway into the sunlit square to ascend a wide stone staircase, passing a blue building wall and a seated man. Finally, the scene expands onto an upper terrace path with stone railings, passing a red-canopied market stall to reveal panoramic views of a distant castle and the ocean beyond.
